com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

Interface Job

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    BatchExecuteJob, ExecuteCampaignJob, ExecuteControlJob, ExecuteTestCaseJob
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BatchExecuteJobImpl, ExecuteCampaignJobImpl, ExecuteControlJobImpl, ExecuteTestCaseJobImpl, JobImpl

    public interface Job
    A handler for execution server tasks. A job is created when IExecutionServer.executeControl(String) or IExecutionServer.executeTestCase(String, String, java.util.List) was called. The jobs are then enqueued are are processed by the server. At a given time, only one execute test case job can be active for a given client. The job's life cycle is defined by it's state see JobStatus for details.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      long getEndTime()
      Returns the test case end time
      java.lang.String getId()
      Returns the job ID as stored in the JobRegistry.
      JobKind getKind()
      The job kind
      java.lang.String getName()
      Returns the job name
      Job getParentJob()
      If this job was started by another job (e.g.
      java.lang.String getSessionId()
      The session where the job was created
      long getStartTime()
      Returns the test case start time
      JobStatus getStatus()
      Returns the job status
      void join()
      Block until job execution finishes (status is JobStatus.CANCELLED or JobStatus.FINISHED).
      void join(long milliseconds)
      Block until job execution finishes or timeout (status is JobStatus.CANCELLED or JobStatus.FINISHED).

    • Method Detail

      • getId

        java.lang.String getId()
        Returns the job ID as stored in the JobRegistry.
        Returns:
        the job ID

      • getName

        java.lang.String getName()
        Returns the job name
        Returns:
        the job name

      • getSessionId

        java.lang.String getSessionId()
        The session where the job was created
        Returns:
        the session

      • getKind

        JobKind getKind()
        The job kind
        Returns:
        the kind

      • getStatus

        JobStatus getStatus()
        Returns the job status
        Returns:
        the job status

      • getStartTime

        long getStartTime()
        Returns the test case start time
        Returns:
        test case start time

      • getEndTime

        long getEndTime()
        Returns the test case end time
        Returns:
        test case end time

      • join

        void join()
   throws java.lang.InterruptedException
        Block until job execution finishes (status is JobStatus.CANCELLED or JobStatus.FINISHED).
        Throws:
        java.lang.InterruptedException - if any thread interrupted the current thread before or while the current thread was waiting for job execution to finish. The interrupted status of the current thread is cleared when this exception is thrown.

      • join

        void join(long milliseconds)
   throws java.lang.InterruptedException,
          java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException
        Block until job execution finishes or timeout (status is JobStatus.CANCELLED or JobStatus.FINISHED).
        Parameters:
        milliseconds - timeout for wait in milliseconds
        Throws:
        java.lang.InterruptedException - if any thread interrupted the current thread before or while the current thread was waiting for job execution to finish. The interrupted status of the current thread is cleared when this exception is thrown.
        java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException - if the timeout has run out however the job is not JobStatus.CANCELLED or JobStatus.FINISHED

      • getParentJob

        Job getParentJob()
        If this job was started by another job (e.g. control execution job), the starter-job is the parent.
        Returns:
        the parent job which started this job
